Description: API key for AI post generation
The numeric ID of your Facebook Page
How to Get It: Facebook Page → About → Page ID (or Graph API Explorer)

Description: Long-lived access token for posting to a Facebook Page
How to Get It: Meta for Developers → Graph API Explorer → Generate Page Access Token

Description: App-only Bearer Token for read operations
OAuth access token for TikTok Content Posting API
How to Get It: https://developers.tiktok.com/ → Login Kit / Content Posting API OAuth flow

Description: Numeric ID of your Instagram Business Account
How to Get It: Facebook Graph API: GET /me/accounts → linked IG account ID

Description: Page access token with instagram_basic + instagram_content_publish permissions
How to Get It: Meta for Developers → Graph API Explorer → generate token with IG permissions

Description: OAuth 2.0 access token with w_member_social permission
How to Get It: https://www.linkedin.com/developers/ → OAuth 2.0 flow with w_member_social scope

Description: Your LinkedIn member or organization URN (e.g. urn:li:person:xxxx)
How to Get It: Call GET https://api.linkedin.com/v2/me after OAuth to retrieve the `id` field
